# Pull Request

Thank you for contributing to Focus Adventure.

## What does this PR do?

Please clearly describe:

- What you changed
- Why the change is needed
- What problem it solves

## Related Issue

Link the related issue, if applicable.

Example:

Closes #123

If none:

N/A

## Type of Change

Check all that apply:

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] New game or activity
- [ ] Accessibility improvement
- [ ] UI/UX improvement
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactoring
- [ ] Testing
- [ ] Security or privacy improvement
- [ ] Other

## How Was This Tested?

Describe how you tested your changes.

Include relevant:

- Browsers
- Devices
- Manual testing
- Automated tests

## Screenshots / Videos

For visual or gameplay changes, please include screenshots or a short recording if possible.

If not applicable:

N/A

## Accessibility

If this change affects UI or gameplay, please consider:

- [ ] Keyboard navigation
- [ ] Touch interaction
- [ ] Screen-reader accessibility where applicable
- [ ] Color contrast
- [ ] Reduced-motion preferences
- [ ] Alternatives to color-only feedback
- [ ] Clear and child-friendly instructions

## Child Safety and Privacy

Please confirm:

- [ ] This change does not unnecessarily collect personal information.
- [ ] This change does not introduce behavioral advertising or unnecessary tracking.
- [ ] No passwords, API keys, tokens, credentials, or personal information are included.
- [ ] Any new third-party service or dependency has been considered for privacy and security.

If this PR introduces accounts, analytics, cloud storage, AI services, social features, or collection/transmission of user information, explain it here:

N/A

## Medical and ADHD-Related Claims

Please confirm:

- [ ] This change does not make unsupported claims that Focus Adventure diagnoses, treats, cures, or prevents ADHD or another medical condition.

If this PR introduces ADHD, cognitive, psychological, educational, or health-related claims, provide appropriate references and context.

## Contributor Checklist

- [ ] I reviewed my own changes.
- [ ] My changes are focused on this Pull Request.
- [ ] I tested the affected functionality.
- [ ] I ran applicable lint/build checks.
- [ ] I did not knowingly introduce security vulnerabilities.
- [ ] I did not commit secrets or sensitive information.
- [ ] I followed `CONTRIBUTING.md`.
- [ ] I have the right to contribute the submitted code and assets.
- [ ] My contribution can be distributed under the Apache License 2.0.

## Additional Notes

Add anything else reviewers should know here.

Thank you for helping build Focus Adventure.
